Subject: Tariff news, dealer M&A roundup, and 5 worksite safety tips

This week's headlines:
- New 25% tariff on imported hydraulic components — what it means for parts pricing
- Dealer consolidation: Caterpillar dealer in TX acquires three independents

- Q2 industry hiring outlook
